message: Yes, that's right. You're Tony Ford, aren't you?
Oh my, I must really have become famous. Knowing even about the detective means I can't act recklessly.
You're not planning on causing any trouble, are you?
Well now, who's to say? Hehehe.
What do you need this time?
This can't be called a party. The stage is decent, but the casting is terrible.
The food and fine wine are impeccable, but
You know, it’d be better for you to focus on eating today. I don’t think there’s anything else worthwhile to gain.
We were invited just to fill the numbers, I guess.
It’s finally starting to feel like a party.
Thanks to the appearance of the two leading actresses.
Is there any other novel change?
It’s a good opportunity to meet actresses. If Lady Luck is with you, you might end up getting close.
Movies? I’m not really interested in films.
So you won’t be appearing in this movie?
I’m actually a stage actor. The dynamics are too different between stage and film, and I have no intention of acting in movies.
It's a shame, considering you're friends with Director Fabar.
A shame, huh? Just because you know a film director, does that mean you have to act in movies?
No, that's not what I meant.
You can’t underestimate the stage. I mean, that kind of thinking really ticks me off.
I've heard this movie will tackle sports players' drug issues, right? Is Guy gonna be okay?
Guy can manage just fine without relying on drugs.
Hmph, don't you think that not speaking ill of your friends is what friendship is all about?
It's not that kind of pathetic relationship.
Is that how it is? I have so few people I can call friends that I may never understand that realm.
For me, movies are something I watch, but I don't want to be in them.
But you know, this movie is like a gathering of crowd-pulling pandas.
Rude? We're talking about a popular talent, a major league star, and an actress who recently rose to fame, plus an actress who sees that as competition.
Mmm, when you put it that way, it really is an impressive lineup.
You think so? I can only think Fabar has gone mad; his directing career might be in jeopardy.
I've liked Fabar's previous works. So I don't want him making movies that pander to the masses.
I’m not interested in your girl. If she were a more mature woman, I might be tempted.
Oh really? I think she suits you well. Hehe.
It's okay, I won't take that girl away.
Let me give you some advice. I think it's not great to conduct business in a place like this.
No, I mean, when you need a detective, please call our detective agency or something.
It seems like that girl is misunderstanding something.
She might not mean any harm, but she's got some issues with her words and actions.
She's a smart girl, and I can't get the upper hand on her.
Indeed, she seems to be quite sharp.
Yeah, right. That nagging is something I can't stand. It's just not, how should I put it, charming.
It's not that I dislike her, but she's just not my type.
No, she's not the type that guys usually like.
At 19, she's never even experienced love.
I think judging on such things is a bit much, though.
You'll understand once you talk to her.
No way, no way. If the conversation is dull, even the finest wine loses its charm.
What do you think I would extract from her?
She's like my arch-nemesis, detective. So can we stop talking about her?
It's pathetic to be arch-enemies with a 19-year-old girl, huh? Hehehe.
Yeah, I'm skipping the talk about that woman.
You hit the nail on the head.
I'm just being honest, you know. I can't talk about social niceties. Hehe.
I have nothing to talk about.
I really don't want to talk about that woman.
If she heard something like that, she'd take it badly.
I think she might become a big shot?
You know, I'm also doing direction. I have an eye for people.
I look forward to seeing her in a few years. She'll become a good woman.
Right? I want to put powder on her now, but that Ms. Won...
It'd be nice if she just weren't there.
If only her agent would change, she'd be perfect.
Isn't it strange? A friendship between a 16-year-old and a 24-year-old.
That's because you don't know anything. Hehehe.
It wouldn't be too bad to lay a claim on her now.
Yeah, I think she's an interesting woman in many ways.
Hehe, she's a woman full of various rumors. Well, she's an actress, so that's expected, but in her case, there are a lot of peculiar ones.
Yeah, like the rumor about her having a hysteria episode and stabbing a makeup girl with a knife—she has some scary rumors. You should be careful too.
I used to try to hit on her, you know. Now I'm too scared.
She’s like the wife of Director Fabar.
However, it seems the recent director is quite taken with Jennifer, who is like the Ice Queen, so I think that relationship is also precarious.
It's kind of funny how he gets all bashful.
She changed her personality the moment she became famous.
I met him at a shop through a mutual friend's introduction.
So you hit it off and became close, then?
Yeah, well, something like that. We share similar hobbies.
He's a good guy. Just a little weak.
resulted from his father's upbringing, but it seems he's gotten a bit stronger lately.
He's a happy man living life the way he likes.
He tends to get quite nervous before a crank-in. Though he seems to be in good spirits today.
It’s natural to feel mental pressure, especially since you're about to create a work, right?
His situation is a bit special, actually. We were worried about today’s party, but it looks like it’ll end without a hitch, which is good.
People of the artist type tend to be difficult to handle.
Guy is nice, being pampered in the spotlight. That's an enviable situation.
That's something only a novice would think. Haven't you ever heard my rumors?
If Guy is light, then I could be compared to darkness.
I can’t help but envy someone like him; it's just that he's walking a path so different from mine.
Everyone feels that way at some point.
You're probably the same type as me, right? You envy and even hate Guy.
No way!? Why would I feel that way?
It's pointless to play dumb; I have a keen sense for these things.
You and Guy can be friends because you're opposites.
Guy seems to be the type that loves women.
That's how all guys are, isn't it?
No, he’s quite loose with women.
You talk as if you've seen it all yourself?
I'm not making it up; I'm somewhat close to him.
Were you surprised? That I know him.
Oh, she's a nice woman. The kind that makes you want to invite her to bed.
I see, so that’s the kind of relationship you have.
You want me to make the move myself? Well, that could be fun. Hehe.
That type seems like they'd get wild in bed. Hahaha.
She doesn’t seem to be getting along well with Guy.
You can tell just by their vibe.
Trying to hit on her is tough; she's got her defenses up. What a hassle.
Could you tell me more about that incident?
Hehe, go find out for yourself.
What’s with you? You’re backing off way too easily. You’re such a boring guy.
This is the first time I’ve seen such a horrific incident. Sure, it’s not exactly rare in the United States, but still.
Is it because a body part is missing?
Brutally killing girls who were about to blossom and then dismembering their beautiful bodies is just too much.
Actually, I have a hunch about the culprit.
Huh!? You have a hunch about the culprit?
I think you’d enjoy trying to figure out who the culprit is too.
I suspect, straight to the point, that Jennifer is the culprit, what do you think?
Uh, are you messing with me?
Even beautiful roses have thorns. She is truly a terrifying woman. Don't be fooled by appearances. Hehehe.
It seems the target of the culprit is a woman, but you can’t let your guard down. You should be careful too. Hehehe.
